agent.instructions: Build both immutable jaw_taper candidates sequentially, preserve Blender logs, fresh-reopen verify each, require CLAY_SCULPT_OK and SCULPT_VERIFY_OK, stop on first failure, and never alter candidate values. The dispatch incorrectly named Derived/sculpt-v13/face-sculpt.blend as the generator source.
agent.response: Lower build emitted CLAY_SCULPT_OK. Fresh verifier emitted ValueError: source blend path is not the fixed face proof and no SCULPT_VERIFY_OK. Upper candidate was not attempted.

failureDiagnosis: Root dispatch used the visual champion artifact instead of the fixed generator source required by sculpt_integrity.py. Blender also returned zero after the Python exception because --python-exit-code was absent; the required marker prevented false acceptance.
